long_description:
[STGSRE] Flexvol creation job request failure - Alert-ID: STG-SHARE-SYSDIG-315 in us-south-ngdc-test-staging01-zone1-zone-control and the pod netapp-volume-provisioner is Triggered

TIP Situation: Observed flexvol creation job request failure
TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-share:us-south-ngdc-test::us-south-ngdc-test-staging01-zone1-zone-control:workloadname:netapp-volume-provisioner
TIP Short Description: Observed flexvol creation job request failure

Event Generated:

Severity:         Medium
Metric:
